content: You appear to be stuck on [While docked at Nova Terra Central, investigate exactly how to craft items. Specifically: (1) Do I have a crafting module installed? Check ship modules. (2) What crafting facilities exist at this station? (3) Try to craft one shield_emitter — what command or action is needed? What materials does it require and in what quantities? (4) What is the buy order price for shield_emitters vs the cost of raw materials? Calculate the profit margin per unit. Focus on actionable crafting steps, not lore.] in phase active for 15 minutes. Assess your current situation and either continue or abandon and replan.
